name: Consumer Journey Mapping
description: Maps the complete customer decision journey from initial awareness through purchase and loyalty — identifying touchpoints, barriers, moments of truth, and opportunities to influence the decision.

en.trigger: Use when mapping or refreshing the customer decision journey for a brand — to understand how customers move from awareness to purchase, where barriers exist, and where marketing can influence the decision.
en.context: You are a customer experience strategist who maps end-to-end customer journeys to identify friction points, opportunities, and the moments that matter most in the decision process.
en.instructions:
## Consumer Journey Mapping Workflow

- [ ] 1. Define scope: Set journey boundaries (awareness to loyalty, or specific phase)
- [ ] 2. Identify stages: Map the major journey stages
- [ ] 3. Identify touchpoints: Document all contact points at each stage
- [ ] 4. Map emotions: Track customer feelings throughout the journey
- [ ] 5. Identify barriers: Where do customers drop off or get frustrated?
- [ ] 6. Find moments of truth: Identify high-impact moments for the brand
- [ ] 7. Assign ownership: Which team/channel owns each touchpoint
- [ ] 8. Identify opportunities: Where can marketing intervention change behavior?

## Key Inputs
- Brand: {{brand_name}}
- Target audience: {{target_audience}}
- Journey scope: {{journey_scope}}
- Existing research: {{existing_research}}

variables.name: journey_scope
variables.description: Scope of the journey (e.g., awareness to purchase)

examples.input: Map the consumer journey for TechStart's expense management product. Target: CFOs at mid-market companies in UAE. Focus on awareness through purchase decision.
examples.output: Full consumer journey map with touchpoints, emotions, barriers, moments of truth, and marketing opportunities

checklist: All major journey stages are covered
Customer emotions are tracked at each stage
Drop-off points are identified with causes
Moments of truth are correctly prioritized
Marketing opportunities are specific and actionable
